hypothesis: A combined S3 clean-ladder stack using inherited S2 guards plus the K0/K1 epilepsy-cause bridge improves or preserves S3 cap-25 metrics while making S3 comparable with newer S4/S5 defaults.
metric_caveats: This diagnostic cap tests the combined S3 clean-ladder stack before full validation; it is not a published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
The variant inherits S2 clean-ladder I0/C0/C1/AM guards and adds K0/K1 epilepsy-cause post bridges.
No scorer semantics change; all changes are post-prediction benchmark-facing bridges or guards.
Report per-family F1 and monitor inherited S2 families as regression guards.
S3-only family support is sparse on validation; pooled micro must be interpreted with family-scope caveats.
